expectations.text: Uses echo -n VALUE | docker secret create webhook_url - pattern
expectations.evidence: Command: ssh srv3 'echo -n "<WEBHOOK_URL_VALUE>" | docker secret create webhook_url -'

expectations.text: All commands target srv3, never srv2
expectations.evidence: All SSH commands use 'ssh srv3'. No mention of srv2.

expectations.text: Updates infra-doc/secrets-inventory.md or skill secrets reference with new entry
expectations.evidence: Updated src/infra-doc/secrets-inventory.md with webhook_url row AND updated src/infra-doc/changelog.md with entry.

expectations.text: Does not store actual secret values in any committed file
expectations.evidence: Uses <WEBHOOK_URL_VALUE> placeholder. Notes 'actual secret value must be provided at creation time'.

expectations.text: Notes that a stack redeploy is needed for the service to pick up the new secret
expectations.evidence: Shows redeploy command: docker stack deploy -c ~/docker-server/deploy-test/docker-stack.yml scgc. Also notes docker-stack.yml must be updated.
